response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/cloud environments; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent, substantial work with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with diverse tech exposure
Proven experience in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to build scalable, event-driven systems
concerns: No recent C++ development; core requirement of the role is severely underrepresented
Lacks documented experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols (OPC UA, Modbus, etc.)
Primary tech stack is web-focused (TypeScript/Node.js), not aligned with on-premises, low-latency C++ systems
